title: Chad warns Sudan it will retaliate after drone strike on mourners kills 17
content: President Idris Mahamat Déby orders the military to be on high alert and a "total closure" of the border.

originalTitle: Denounce 'abject' Afcon decision - senior Caf member
title: Denounce 'abject' Afcon decision - senior Caf member
content: Caf executive committee member Augustin Senghor says the decision to strip Senegal of the 2025 Afcon title is "unacceptable, abject and we have to denounce it".

originalTitle: Starmer meets Nigerian president as record steel deal agreed
title: Starmer meets Nigerian president as record steel deal agreed
content: The deal came as part of the president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

originalTitle: Missile strikes close to reporter during Israeli attacks in Lebanon
title: Missile strikes close to reporter during Israeli attacks in Lebanon
content: A missile struck metres away from a Russia Today reporter as he was covering Israeli attacks on southern Lebanon.

title: Iran attacks cut 17% of Qatar’s LNG capacity for up to 5 years: QatarEnergy
content: CEO Saad al-Kaabi says QatarEnergy may have to declare force majeure on long-term contracts for up to five years.

content: News of the invitation emerges after the monarch acknowledged "a lot of abuse" during the Spanish conquest of Mexico.

title: English dominance of Champions League group phase prompts debate
